title: alyssum damascenum
intro: Alyssum damascenum, also known as Damascena or sweet alissum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and flowers are used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as provide relief from anxiety and stress. Alyssum damascenum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy and as a natural ingredient in cosmetics and skincare products.
